---
id: runtime-failure-mode-dependency-graph
title: Governance Runtime Failure-Mode Dependency Graph
owner: governance-steward
status: DRAFT
aspirational: true
---

# UIAO Governance Runtime Failure-Mode Dependency Graph

## How Failures Propagate Across the Governance Runtime

---

## Mermaid Diagram

[DIAGRAM-01: Top-down dependency graph diagram showing runtime failure-mode dependencies. Top container labeled "GitHub" (dashed group outline) contains four source boxes: Issues, Pull Requests, CI Events, Workflow Triggers. Arrows lead downward from the GitHub sources into ingestion components: Issues → Webhook Handler; Pull Requests → Webhook Handler; CI Events → CI Validator; Workflow Triggers → Weekly Drift Workflow. All three ingestion components (Webhook Handler, CI Validator, Weekly Drift Workflow) converge into a central box: "Governance API". The Governance API has a bidirectional arrow with a database-drum icon "PostgreSQL" below it. The Governance API also flows to "Governance Dashboard" (terminal). Engineering blueprint style, federal navy primary boxes, 16:9 landscape.]

---

## Failure Mode Annotations

### Webhook Handler Failure

- Event Loss: Missing SLA Updates
- Mislabeling: Wrong severity/SLA state applied

### CI Validator Failure

- Misclassification: Incorrect Drift Detection
- Outdated schema: Drift undetected

### Workflow Crash

- Undetected Drift: Weekly report missing

### DB Write Error

- SLA/Drift State Corruption

### Dashboard Stale Data

- Incorrect Governance Decisions

---

## ASCII Diagram

```
GitHub --> Webhook --> API --> DB --> Dashboard
     |--> CI --------^
     |--> Workflow --^

Failure Modes:
- Webhook loss       --> SLA timers wrong
- CI misclassify     --> Drift undetected or false drift
- Workflow crash     --> Weekly drift missing
- DB write failure   --> Corrupted SLA/drift state
- Dashboard stale    --> Incorrect governance decisions
```

> **SSOT Reference:** See /ssot/UIAO-SSOT.md
